blocks.text: Now I'll run the DESeq2 analysis in R:

input.code:
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)

# Load counts and metadata
counts <- read.csv('counts_de.csv', row.names=1)
metadata <- read.csv('metadata_de.csv', row.names=1)

# Convert to integer matrix (DESeq2 requirement)
counts <- as.matrix(counts)
mode(counts) <- 'integer'

print(paste("Counts matrix:", nrow(counts), "genes ×", ncol(counts), "cells"))
print(paste("Metadata:", nrow(metadata), "samples"))
print(table(metadata$cell_type))

# Construct DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts,
                               colData = metadata,
                               design = ~ cell_type)

print(dds)
